benefit_name: West Virginia Veteran Dependent & Survivor Benefits
summary: Benefits available to dependents and surviving spouses of veterans in West Virginia, including education assistance, survivor pension supplements, healthcare access, and continued eligibility for select state veteran programs.
eligibility: Spouses, surviving spouses, and dependent children of veterans who served and reside in West Virginia. Some benefits require the veteran to have had a service-connected disability or to have died in service.
administering_agency: West Virginia Department of Veterans Assistance

benefit_name: West Virginia Disabled Veteran Enhanced Benefits
summary: Enhanced state benefits for service-connected disabled veterans in West Virginia, including additional property tax exemptions, specialized healthcare access, adaptive housing grants, and priority access to state veteran programs based on disability rating.
eligibility: Veterans with a service-connected disability rating, residing in West Virginia. Higher disability ratings may unlock additional benefit tiers.
administering_agency: West Virginia Department of Veterans Assistance
